recommendations.title: Loulou
recommendations.overview: A bored wife leaves her husband for an unemployed, petty criminal.

recommendations.title: A Nos Amours
recommendations.overview: Fifteen-year-old Suzanne seeks refuge from a disintegrating family in a series of impulsive, promiscuous affairs. Her fulsome sexuality further ratchets up the suppressed passions of her narcissistic brother, insecure mother and brooding, authoritari

recommendations.title: Van Gogh
recommendations.overview: After leaving the asylum, Vincent van Gogh settles in the home of Doctor Gachet, where he keeps painting amidst the torments of his failing mental health. He begins an affair with his host’s daughter, however, she soon realizes that he doesn’t love h

recommendations.title: Police
recommendations.overview: Mangin, a police inspector in Paris, leans hard on informants to get evidence on three Tunisian brothers who traffic in drugs. He arrests one, Simon, and his girl-friend Noria. Simon's brothers go to their lawyer. He springs Noria, who promptly steal

recommendations.title: Faust
recommendations.overview: God and Satan wager on the soul of a learned and prayerful alchemist as part of their eternal war over Earth.

recommendations.title: Shadows of Forgotten Ancestors
recommendations.overview: In the Carpathian Mountains of 19th-century Ukraine, love, hate, life and death among the Hutsul people are as they’ve been since time began. Ivan is drawn to Marichka, the beautiful young daughter of the man who killed his father. But fate tragicall

recommendations.title: Little Tickles
recommendations.overview: Odette is a 8-yr-old girl who loves to dance and draw. Once she has become an adult, Odette realizes she was abused, and immerses herself body and soul in her career as a dancer while trying to deal with her past.

recommendations.title: C.R.A.Z.Y.
recommendations.overview: A young French Canadian, one of five boys in a conservative family in the 1960s and 1970s, struggles to reconcile his emerging identity with his father's values.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: The Kid with a Bike
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by his father, a young boy is left in the hands of an unqualified childcare provider.
